title: Crispy Russian Potato Pancakes
description: Flaky, crispy, and savory, these Russian potato pancakes are a delicious and satisfying side dish.
instructions: Grate the potatoes and squeeze out the excess moisture.
Mix the grated potatoes with the onion, egg, salt, and pepper.
Add the flaky and crumble to the potato mixture and mix well.
Heat a non-stick pan with a small amount of oil over medium heat.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the potato mixture into the pan.
Flatten the potato mixture slightly with a spatula.
Cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden brown.
Serve hot with sour cream or applesauce.
